creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 250330
update to 4.0.2 and all dependencies v2

Improvement after testing build with different options in poudriere.

Also I don't like this:
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libhdf5.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libunwind.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libtinyxml.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libblosc.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libpulse.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libGL.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libGLU.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libGLEW.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libintl.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libiconv.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libalut.so.0
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libminizip-ng.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libSDL2.so
but I don't dare touch it.

In addition, it is very labor-intensive and resource-intensive to fix.
